title: parapolystichum subsimile
intro: Parapolystichum subsimile is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the false shield fern due to its similarity in appearance to the shield fern. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Parapolystichum subsimile include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
